hero.title.line2: Your whole construction business in one place.
hero.subtitle: BuildTrack centralizes projects, time tracking, finance, warehouse and subcontractors — so you spend your day building, not chasing spreadsheets.
hero.note: 14-day free trial · Set up in minutes
beta.title: We are in beta — and that works in your favor
beta.body: BuildTrack already runs on real job sites, but we are still polishing the product. During the beta we work side by side with you: you help us catch the rough edges, we build what your operation needs. You take part for 2 months for $350 with full access to the whole system — no automatic billing: you email us and we arrange everything.
beta.item.0.title: There may be bugs
beta.item.0.body: The system is stable and in daily use, but some features are still being polished. If something breaks, we fix it fast — most issues in days, not months.
beta.item.1.title: You help us report
beta.item.1.body: You get a direct channel to the team. If you find a bug or something is confusing, you tell us and it goes straight into the fix list.
beta.item.2.title: Your feedback drives us
beta.item.2.body: A short call or messages every couple of weeks to learn what works and what is missing. What you ask for outweighs our own roadmap.
beta.item.3.title: Two months for $350
beta.item.3.body: Full access to the whole system for 2 months for $350. No automatic billing: you email us, we arrange payment together, and you are in.
beta.item.4.title: Direct support from the team
beta.item.4.body: You talk to the people building the product — not a bot or a call center. Guided onboarding and setup included.
beta.item.5.title: Your data, safe and yours
beta.item.5.body: Per-company isolation and backups. If you decide to leave, cancel anytime and we hand over your data.
beta.cta: I want to join the beta
beta.note: Limited seats: we take a few companies at a time so each one gets real attention. Email us and we will share the next steps.
beta.emailSubject: I want to join the BuildTrack beta
beta.emailBody:
Hi Anderson,

I'd like to join the BuildTrack beta (2 months for $350, with full access to the whole system). Could you share the next steps?

Company:
Name:

Approx. number of users:
videos.title: BuildTrack in action
videos.subtitle: See how the platform works. We'll keep adding walkthroughs of every module.
videos.punchList.title: Punch list with your client
videos.punchList.subtitle: Clients report punch items with photos from their portal; your team assigns and replies in the thread, and the client confirms closure.
videos.finance.title: Accounts payable
videos.finance.subtitle: Vendor invoices with partial payments, per-project balances, and the scanned invoice one click away.
features.title: Everything your job site needs
features.subtitle: One system for the critical day-to-day flows. No complicated integrations, no duplicate data entry.
features.projects.title: Projects & contracts
features.projects.body: Track every job, its client, budget, change orders and progress — from signing to close-out.
features.time.title: Time & attendance
features.time.body: Geofenced clock-ins, supervisor approval, and payroll-ready hour reports.
features.finance.title: Integrated finance
features.finance.body: Accounts payable and receivable, labor cost, and office expenses — with cash flow and reconciliation.
features.mobile.title: Mobile app for crews
features.mobile.body: Clock in, upload evidence, and communicate from the field, even with spotty connectivity. Available now on Android — iPhone coming soon.
features.subcontractors.title: Subcontractors & warehouse
features.subcontractors.body: Job traceability, photo evidence, tools and consumables under control.
features.audit.title: Audit & roles
features.audit.body: Every action is logged. Role-based access — admin, supervisor, finance, warehouse, subcontractor.
app.title: The job site in your pocket
app.body: Geofenced clock-ins, photo evidence and site progress from every worker's phone — even without signal. Available today on Android; the iPhone version is on the way.
why.title: Built by people who've actually worked in the field.
why.body: Not another generic ERP retrofitted for construction. BuildTrack was born inside a real builder and refined project after project — every flow reflects decisions you've already lived on site.
why.point.0: Fast implementation — productive in one week
why.point.1: Multi-company: each customer in its own isolated space
why.point.2: Bilingual support, in your time zone
mock.label: Active project
mock.subtitle: Phase 3 · 47 workers
cta.subtitle: Join the builders who've already left spreadsheet chaos behind.
